sources.notes: Background notes used for the first scaffold; not canonical MoonCat data.

sources.label: Source Map
sources.notes: Local guidance for source classification; not canonical MoonCat data.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue website
sources.notes: Verified public MoonCatRescue site. Use as an entrypoint, not as a substitute for exact contract or parser data.

sources.label: MoonCatCommunity website
sources.notes: Verified community site. Treat as contextual unless a claim is backed by a primary source.

sources.label: Build with MoonCats
sources.notes: Verified MoonCatRescue developer page. It points to source repositories, contract docs, and IPFS-related resources.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue Contract Documentation
sources.notes: Verified contract documentation page. Exact addresses still need deliberate extraction before data files are filled.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue GitLab group
sources.notes: Verified GitLab group for MoonCatRescue tools, websites, and contracts.

sources.label: ChainStation source
sources.notes: Verified GitLab repository for the ChainStation web application.

sources.label: libMoonCat
sources.notes: Verified GitLab repository linked from the MoonCatRescue developer page.

sources.label: ponderware GitHub
sources.notes: Verified GitHub account linked from the MoonCatRescue developer page for historical original-code context.

sources.label: ponderware mooncatparser
sources.notes: Verified repository describing itself as the official MoonCat generation library. Do not derive trait mappings without a separate review.

sources.label: ponderware MoonCatRescue contract repository
sources.notes: Verified repository describing itself as the official MoonCatRescue Ethereum smart contract. Exact addresses remain intentionally unfilled.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue.sol raw source
sources.notes: Raw Solidity source used for the first protocol-constants import pass.

sources.label: MoonCat DAO GitHub
sources.notes: Verified GitHub URL provided by the user. Treat repository contents according to their own provenance before deriving canonical data.

sources.label: Rate My Mooncat
sources.notes: Verified reachable site. The site states its character-cat charts are subjective DAO/community narratives and not official traits.

sources.label: MoonCat DAO old wiki
sources.notes: Verified reachable GitHub path. Treat as community-maintained historical context until individual pages are reviewed.

sources.label: MoonCats FAQ and official links
sources.notes: Local Discord-derived file supplied as mostly correct but potentially outdated. Use it to discover links, then verify each link before importing facts.

sources.label: Extracted source links, 2026-07-02
sources.notes: Preserves links extracted from FAQ/Discord material. Each link should be verified before importing facts.

sources.label: MoonCat rescue order by category
sources.notes: Local user-provided JSON file containing all character-cat index numbers. Premium index numbers are not included.

sources.label: Etherscan original MoonCatRescue contract page
sources.notes: Candidate canonical contract reference from extracted links. Do not import addresses or constants without a focused verification pass.

sources.label: Etherscan Acclimated MoonCats contract page
sources.notes: Verified Etherscan page for the Acclimated MoonCats token contract at 0xc3f733ca98E0daD0386979Eb96fb1722A1A05E69. Use for contract/source provenance; do not generalize token ID behavior to older wrappers or unrelated contracts.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue log: Chained to the Future
sources.notes: Verified MoonCatRescue log page titled Chained to the Future, dated 2022-01-14 / epoch 91999. The page links to on-chain materialization contract pages for MoonCatReference, MoonCatTraits, MoonCatColors, MoonCatSVGs, and MoonCatAccessoryImages; those linked contract details still need a focused review before import into data/contracts.json.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue Medium publication
sources.notes: Publication index from extracted links. Individual articles should be reviewed before supporting facts.

sources.label: MoonCats On-Chain Guide
sources.notes: Candidate explanatory source. Verify technical claims against contract, parser, or official docs before import.

sources.label: On Chain, Generative Art?
sources.notes: Candidate explanatory source. Do not treat as canonical trait or contract data.

sources.label: Of Mice and MoonCats
sources.notes: Community article from extracted links. Treat as supporting context only.

sources.label: MoonCat Explainer
sources.notes: Community reference from extracted links. Verify any imported facts against primary sources.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue on the Blockchain GitHub repo
sources.notes: Older related repository from extracted links. Review repository provenance before using for data imports.

sources.label: Dune MoonCat Rescue dashboard
supports: candidate derived rescue or market references
sources.notes: Community-derived analytics dashboard. Use only with query review and source confirmation.

sources.label: Dune MoonCat Characters dashboard
sources.notes: Community-derived dashboard that may help future character-cat verification. Do not import memberships without review.

sources.label: Dune Rare Mooncat Dashboard
sources.notes: Community-derived rarity dashboard. Do not import rarity claims without review.

sources.label: MoonCats: Inside Ethereum's Early On-Chain Generative Machinery
sources.notes: Community article provided for future review. Verify technical claims against contract, parser, or official docs before import.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue API
sources.notes: Verified landing page for the preferred newer API. It states that the API serves MoonCat metadata and images, uses JSON for traits and metadata, and returns PNG renders unless otherwise noted.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue API OpenAPI spec
sources.notes: Verified reachable YAML OpenAPI spec for the preferred newer API. Do not import full schemas unless a focused schema pass is requested.

sources.label: MoonCatRescue API Swagger UI
sources.notes: Verified reachable Swagger UI for the preferred newer API.

sources.label: MoonCatCommunity API
sources.notes: Verified landing page for the older API. Treat as still valid legacy infrastructure, not broken, while preferring the newer MoonCatRescue API for new integrations.

sources.label: MoonCatCommunity API OpenAPI spec
sources.notes: Verified raw YAML OpenAPI spec linked from the legacy API landing page. Do not import full schemas unless a focused schema pass is requested.

todos: Extract exact contract addresses, CIDs, API endpoints, IDs, and trait mappings only in focused follow-up passes.
Add derived data entries only after documenting the generating source or method.
